title: Hody Controls the Fish-Man District
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Narrator, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Fish-Men, Hody Jones, New Fish-Man Pirates, King Neptune. The core story beat is hody controls the fish-man district.
scene: The scene centers on hody controls the fish-man district, with Narrator, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Fish-Men, Hody Jones, New Fish-Man Pirates, King Neptune driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is our only chance! Everyone get on board!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Silence!! Silence!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All hands, man the oars!! Set sail!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All right!! We're out, and they haven't found us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give up on the mermaid Cafe'- it's not happening!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...We're never coming near fishman Island again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hurry it up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry!! We've just gotta make it through the red line!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Honestly... this is outrageous! First we make a narrow escape from a dozing kraken...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But... my mermaid Cafe'...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I said give up on it already!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: ...then we find ourselves surrounded by a whole horse of sea monsters, ten thousand metres below the surface...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And the fishmen ask us to submit to them or die?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In a situation like that, what choice is there but to submit to them temporarily?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Quit moping around and get moving, men!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're lucky enough just to be alive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...they ran for it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Humans like to run...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So they ran again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: shall I tear their flesh to shreds?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: These humans never learn...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kyak Kya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let them run... Jahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can use them to set another example...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: member of the new fishman pirates ZEO (wobbegong fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: member of the new fishman pirates DOSUN (hammerhead shark fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: ZEO (wobbegong fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: member of the new fishman pirates DARUMA: (cookiecutter shark fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: captain of the new fishman pirates HORDAY JONES (great white shark fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: NUHAIA!!! Then I shall take care of them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: member of the new fishman pirates (KAROS MUHHI) (giant solid fishman)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, you will not, IKAROS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Muhh!! Roger that!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: I will take care of them...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Prepare a bubble.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gahhhhhhhhhhh!!! you can't swallow that many at once!!! That drug is powerful!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nnann nnnigg ggg...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...GGG GHA GHA AAAAA AAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hahahia hahah...

summary: Hody Controls the Fish-Man District. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
